news_items.headline: Fantasy Baseball Forecaster Week 13: June 22-28
news_items.description: Set your lineups for the week ahead in fantasy baseball with our preview featuring pitcher rankings, hitter ratings and schedule observations.

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB proposes international draft as part of CBA talks
news_items.description: Major League Baseball has once again proposed an international draft as part of its negotiations over a new collective bargaining agreement, sources told ESPN, painting it as a push to provide structure for an increasingly unruly and corrupt system.

news_items.headline: Brewers' Priester to have season-ending thoracic outlet surgery
news_items.description: Milwaukee Brewers right-hander Quinn Priester will undergo season-ending surgery for thoracic outlet syndrome and is expected to be sidelined for eight to 10 months.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball: How to maximize the value of stolen bases
news_items.description: Have teams finally caught up to the rules changes and figured out how to defend the steal?

news_items.headline: With the top four locked, who is the fifth best team in baseball?
news_items.description: With the top four locked, who is the fifth best team in baseball?

news_items.headline: ESPN fantasy baseball rankings: 2026 points leagues
news_items.description: Here are Tristan H. Cockcroft's fantasy baseball rankings for ESPN points leagues for the remainder of the season.
